general.name: Setup Island Extension in Safari
general.payloads: <?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?><!DOCTYPE plist PUBLIC "-//Apple//DTD PLIST 1.0//EN" "http://www.apple.com/DTDs/PropertyList-1.0.dtd"> <plist version="1"><dict><key>PayloadUUID</key><string>5B269343-237E-4292-8127-49C854ECB05A</string><key>PayloadType</key><string>Configuration</string><key>PayloadOrganization</key><string>Saks</string><key>PayloadIdentifier</key><string>5B269343-237E-4292-8127-49C854ECB05A</string><key>PayloadDisplayName</key><string>Setup Island Extension in Safari</string><key>PayloadDescription</key><string/><key>PayloadVersion</key><integer>1</integer><key>PayloadEnabled</key><true/><key>PayloadRemovalDisallowed</key><true/><key>PayloadScope</key><string>System</string><key>PayloadContent</key><array><dict><key>PayloadDisplayName</key><string>Custom Settings</string><key>PayloadIdentifier</key><string>ED5C3DB5-4B9E-4611-9FFC-B58BEE7949E2</string><key>PayloadOrganization</key><string>JAMF Software</string><key>PayloadType</key><string>com.apple.ManagedClient.preferences</string><key>PayloadUUID</key><string>ED5C3DB5-4B9E-4611-9FFC-B58BEE7949E2</string><key>PayloadVersion</key><integer>1</integer><key>PayloadContent</key><dict><key>io.island.SafariExtension.Extension</key><dict><key>Forced</key><array><dict><key>mcx_preference_settings</key><dict><key>AccessToken</key><string>eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiIsInR5cCI6IkpXVCJ9..7KrDojze_bZ5ryNF4MMlx_J4ZqH8Lx4MYE9cm1M0Cok</string></dict></dict></array></dict></dict></dict></array></dict></plist>
